task_completion.description: Create a new tax return profile for Clara Vogt in Saskatchewan

task_completion.description: Enter income from all T4 slips

task_completion.description: Claim the Eligible Educator School Supply Tax Credit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The worksheet or form for the Eligible Educator School Supply Tax Credit (Line 31217) is visible in StudioTax with an amount entered.
The section or schedule for Student Loan Interest (Line 31900) is visible in StudioTax with an amount entered.

task_completion.description: Complete Form RC360 for the Saskatchewan Graduate Retention Program
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form RC360 (Saskatchewan Graduate Retention Program) is visible in StudioTax, with details filled in indicating a 2023 graduate.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as clara_vogt.24t in the specified directory
